title: Fortuna (disambiguation)
content:
'''Fortuna''' could refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Bib Fortuna]]''', a male Twi'lek who served as Jabba the Hutt's majordomo.
*'''[[Beezer Fortuna]]''', a Twi'lek who was active around the time of the theft of the Death Star plans.

==Legends==
*'''[[Fortuna City]]''', the capital city of Edan II.
*'''[[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]]''', a male Twi'lek from Ryloth that served as a majordomo to Jabba Desilijic Tiure.
*'''[[Komad Fortuna]]''', a Twi'lek hunter that was on Tatooine during the Jedi Civil War.
*'''[[Ob Fortuna]]''', a male Twi'lek from Ryloth who was a distant relative of Bib Fortuna.

{{Disambig}}
